description: Search UTF-8 workspace files for text. Returns bounded path, line, and preview matches.
name: search_workspace

description: Read a bounded line range from a UTF-8 file inside the workspace.
name: read_file

description: Atomically replace exactly one text occurrence in a workspace file. Pass an empty oldText only when creating a new file.
name: apply_patch

description: Report editor diagnostics. This portable build returns an unavailable result until Lvce exposes a diagnostics consumer API.
name: get_diagnostics

description: Run a Bash command in the workspace. This tool is available only in the Node host and is disabled on the web platform.
name: run_command
